summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a solid 1995 show with standout performances of Loose Lucy, Visions of Johanna and Lucy in the Sky.
review: The recording captures a well‑mixed soundboard feed with a punchy drum sound and clear overall balance. Musically the concert is praised for its tight playing and memorable moments – especially Loose Lucy, Visions of Johanna, Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds and the rare Alabama Getaway – though a few reviewers note Jerry’s vocals were a bit weary late in the set. Overall fans feel this is an enjoyable snapshot of the band’s spring‑1995 run.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 4–5 stars and highlight both strong musical moments and high‑quality soundboard audio; only minor vocal fatigue is mentioned, keeping the overall rating in the good‑to‑great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Well recorded with a tighter, tougher drum mix; clear and balanced throughout with no major dropouts or muddiness reported.

standout_songs: Lucy In The Sky With Diamonds
show_quality.setlist_flow: A long, solid set that revives several classics (Alabama Getaway, Visions) and keeps the energy high early on; later in the show Jerry’s vocals show some wear but the overall flow remains engaging.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Solid guitar work and classic vocal moments, though his voice sounds a bit tired toward the end and he steps out of the mix during the drum break.
band_member_comments.Drums: Tougher, punchy drum sound praised; drummers interact well with Jerry during the outro.
